title: EventSystemConfig
description:
Configuration for an event system with various callback patterns.

Demonstrates how uniform handles functions as properties,
from simple no-arg callbacks to complex generic signatures.

properties.name: onInit
properties.description: Called when the system initializes (no arguments)

properties.name: onDestroy
properties.description: Called when the system is destroyed, returns cleanup success

properties.name: onReady
properties.description: Optional callback when system is ready

properties.name: onTextChange
properties.description: Called when a text value changes

properties.name: onRangeChange
properties.description: Called on numeric input with min/max boundaries

properties.name: onToggle
properties.description: Called when a toggle state changes

properties.name: onUserSelect
properties.description: Called when a user is selected

properties.name: onFilter
properties.description: Called when multiple filters are applied

properties.name: validate
properties.description: Validates input, returns error message or null

properties.name: onSubscribe
properties.description: Callback that receives another callback (nested function)
